rows.notes: Added from gpt-5-mini, as gemini-flash missed this page number. Visually confirmed '45' in the top-left corner.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Visually confirmed as a clear year header, centered at the top.
gpt-5-mini's transcription of 'General Acct.' with a period is visually confirmed. gemini-flash used a colon instead of a period. This is a clear account title header on the right.

Selected gemini-flash. Visually confirmed that 'Dues composition' is on the same line as the amount '53 17 6' in the first set of amount columns. gpt-5-mini incorrectly identified this as a header without an amount.

Selected gemini-flash. Visually confirmed that 'Total Receipts' is a label in the left column with no associated amount on the same line. The amount '53 17 6' is on the preceding line. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned the amount to this line and classified it as an entry.

Selected gemini-flash. Visually confirmed: The description is 'Balance from General Acct. I'. The amount is '228' pounds, '16' shillings, and '0' pence (implied by the blank space). gpt-5-mini incorrectly read shillings as '1' and pence as '6'.

Selected gemini-flash. Visually confirmed: The description is 'Balance at beginning of Acct.'. The amount is '8467' pounds, '17' shillings, '2' pence. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read pounds as '8147'. gpt-5-mini's note about 'ornate' script suggesting uncertainty was useful but its actual reading was incorrect.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Visually confirmed as a clear total line, indicated by the '£' symbol and a double underline beneath the amount.
